developer.title: API Integration
developer.description: Integrate Pave's payment API into your application with just a few lines of code. Our RESTful API is designed for developers who want to move fast.

company.title: Global Payments
company.description: Accept payments from customers worldwide without currency conversion fees. Crypto enables borderless transactions, expanding your market reach instantly.

company.title: Analytics Dashboard
company.description: Get deep insights into your sales performance with real-time analytics. Track revenue, conversion rates, and customer behavior all in one place.

company.title: Sales Page Builder
company.description: Create beautiful, high-converting sales pages in minutes with our drag-and-drop builder. No design or coding skills required.

company.title: Instant Settlements
company.description: No more waiting for funds. Get paid instantly to your crypto wallet or choose auto-conversion to your preferred fiat currency.
